commit_scope: Resolve web npm audit findings with bounded transitive overrides and Next 16 TypeScript config updates.

commands: cd web && npm run test -- tests/homepage-presence-lineage.test.ts
local_validation.summary: Web audit now reports zero vulnerabilities after constraining vulnerable transitive leaves with npm overrides: postcss >=8.5.10, uuid >=11.1.1, viem >=2.50.4, and ws >=8.20.1. Next 16 build rewrote next-env.d.ts and tsconfig.json to its current TypeScript conventions, and the web homepage lineage test plus production build both pass. The local worktree verifier now seeds lc-pulse into the temporary graph before route checks and checks static chunks by HTTP reachability only, so generated JavaScript error strings do not masquerade as runtime page failures.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Web dependency audit is clean without changing public wallet API usage or forcing a wagmi major migration. Local web runtime verification no longer fails on missing lc-pulse seed data or static JavaScript chunks that contain literal runtime error strings.
test_flows: Next production build completes with the override tree

phase_gate.reason: Local validation is complete. CI/PR validation remains pending until the branch is pushed and checked.

evidence_refs: cd web && npm run test -- tests/homepage-presence-lineage.test.ts
